name: @athena/design-tokens
description: Typed design tokens + light/dark theme.css, generated from tokens.source.json (a copy of specs/designs/athena-tokens.json).

metadata.regenerate: Edit tokens.source.json (a copy of specs/designs/athena-tokens.json), then run `pnpm --filter @athena/design-tokens generate` to rebuild src/tokens.ts and src/theme.css.
